title: sphaeranthus indicus
intro: Sphaeranthus indicus, also known as the globeflower or button flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in digestion. Sphaeranthus indicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine in various forms, including powders and decoctions.
